segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Hello, Junior Cycle camp, Jake speaking.
segments.zh: 你好，这里是青少年骑行营，我是杰克。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Hi.
segments.zh: 嗨，我打电话来咨询一下骑行营的情况——我在考虑送我儿子来。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: I'm calling for some information about the cycle camp – I'm thinking of sending my son.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Great.
segments.zh: 太好了。这个营在暑假期间每个工作日上午举办，我们重点教基础骑行技能和安全知识。我们为三岁以上的孩子设有八个级别。您儿子多大了？

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Well, it's held every weekday morning over the summer vacation and we focus on basic cycling skills and safety.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: We have eight levels for children from three years upwards.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: How old's your son?

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Charlie?
segments.zh: 查理？他七岁了。他会骑自行车，但在安全上路之前还需要多练练。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: He's seven.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: He can ride a bike, but he needs a little more training before he's safe to go on the road.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: He'd probably be best in Level 5.
segments.zh: 他可能最适合第五级。他们先在我们场地练习，我们的目标是让他们上路骑行，但首先会带他们去公园骑，远离车流。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: They start off practising on the site here, and we aim to get them riding on the road, but first they're taken to ride in the park, away from the traffic.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。能给我讲讲教练的情况吗？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: And can you tell me a bit about the instructors?

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Well, all our staff wear different coloured shirts.
segments.zh: 嗯，我们所有员工都穿不同颜色的衬衫。我们有三位主管，穿红色衬衫。他们支持教练，如果我不在，他们也会代替我。教练们穿蓝色衬衫，每个班由一位教练负责。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: So, we have three supervisors, and they have red shirts.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: They support the instructors, and they also stand in for me if I'm not around.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Then the instructors themselves are in blue shirts, and one of these is responsible for each class.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: In order to be accepted, all our instructors have to submit a reference from someone who's seen them work with children – like if they've worked as a babysitter, for example.
segments.zh: 为了被录用，我们所有的教练都必须提交一份推荐信，来自那些见过他们和孩子一起工作的人——比如他们做过保姆之类的。然后他们必须完成我们的培训课程，包括如何做教案，以及一般如何照顾班上孩子的健康。我得说，他们做得非常棒。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Then they have to complete our training course, including how to do lesson plans, and generally care for the well-being of the kids in their class.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: They do a great job, I have to say.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。跟我说说班级的情况吧。查理的班会有多大？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: And tell me a bit about the classes.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: What size will Charlie's class be?

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: We have a limit of eight children in each class, so their instructor really gets to know them well.
segments.zh: 我们每个班最多八个孩子，所以教练能真正了解他们。大部分时间他们在骑车，但也有安静的时候，教练可能会讲一个和骑行有关的故事，或者让他们一起玩游戏。非常有趣。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: They're out riding most of the time but they have quiet times too, where their instructor might tell them a story that's got something to do with cycling, or get them to play a game together.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: It's a lot of fun.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: It must be.
segments.zh: 那肯定。如果下雨怎么办？课程还会继续吗？

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Now, what happens if there's rain?

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Do the classes still run?

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Oh yes.
segments.zh: 会的。我们不会因为下雨就取消——我们穿上防水服继续骑。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: We don't let that put us off – we just put on our waterproofs and keep cycling.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: And is there anything special Charlie should bring along with him?
segments.zh: 那查理需要带什么特别的东西吗？

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Well, maybe some spare clothes, especially if the weather's not so good.
segments.zh: 嗯，也许带些备用衣服，特别是天气不太好的时候。还有休息时间吃的零食。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: And a snack for break time.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: How about a drink?
segments.zh: 那饮料呢？

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: No, we'll provide that.
segments.zh: 不，我们会提供那个。另外确保他穿的是鞋，不是凉鞋。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: And make sure he has shoes, not sandals.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Sure.
segments.zh: 好的。目前查理每隔几小时就要吃药，我会确保他带着药。

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: And just at present Charlie has to take medication every few hours, so I'll make sure he has that.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Absolutely.
segments.zh: 当然。只要告诉我们他需要吃药的时间，我们会确保他按时吃。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Just give us details of when he has to take it and we'll make sure he does.

segments.speaker: WOMAN
segments.en: Thanks.
segments.zh: 谢谢。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: Now, there are a few things you should know about Day 1 of the camp.
segments.zh: 现在，关于夏令营第一天有几件事你要知道。通常每天上午9:30开始上课，但第一天你最好在9:20之前把查理送到。结束时间照常是12:30。我们需要多出这点时间是因为有一些额外的事情要做。最重要的是我们要仔细检查每个孩子的头盔是否合适。

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: The classes normally start at 9.30 every morning, but on Day 1 you should aim to get Charlie here by 9.20.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: The finishing time will be 12.30 as usual.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: We need the additional time because there are a few extra things to do.

segments.speaker: JAKE
segments.en: The most important is that we have a very careful check to make sure that every child's helmet fits.

items.prompt: Complete the notes below. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

pairs.note: 原文直接出现 park，与答案完全一致。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到 'ride in the park'，其中 park 即为答案。
